commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=f09fa50537ed6de914f76e35d244c3f756a9aae3)
commands.review_summary:
The PR appends a resolved workspace hash to non-shared sandbox scope keys, forwards that key into Docker creation, and adds regression tests for workspace-scoped agent/session sandbox identity.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests +186. Total +204 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main and v2026.6.10 derive agent/session sandbox identity without workspace identity, and the canonical issue gives a two-HOME same-agent Docker collision path. I did not run Docker in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the upgrade/docs handling are required; automation cannot supply proof from the contributor’s setup.

target.title: fix(sandbox): scope agent sandboxes by workspace
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves
Agent-scoped sandboxes currently key reuse only by agent/session identity. In multi-tenant deployments, the same agent id can be used across separate customer workspaces, so a non-shared sandbox may be reused with the wrong workspace/container identity. This scopes non-shared sandbox lifetime keys by resolved workspace path while preserving shared sandbox behavior.

## Summary
- include the resolved workspace path hash in non-shared sandbox scope keys
- pass the resolved scope key through Docker sandbox creation so container names, labels, and registry entries stay workspace-specific
- cover cross-workspace agent reuse and Docker naming/label behavior with regression tests

## Evidence
- `node scripts/test-projects.mjs src/agents/sandbox.resolveSandboxContext.test.ts src/agents/sandbox/docker.config-hash-recreate.test.ts src/agents/sandbox/docker-backend.test.ts` passed locally: 3 files, 28 tests
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo` passed locally
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo` passed locally
- `git diff --check` passed locally

## Notes
- Existing pre-PR non-shared sandbox containers use the old scope key. After this change, they will be recreated under workspace-scoped names and the old containers will age out through the existing sandbox prune path.
Full repo extension typecheck currently fails on unrelated `acpx` and `qa-lab` / `@openclaw/crabline` errors.
target.author: tayoun
